meta.title: Perle Labs Creator: The Frontline of Human-Led AI

transcript:
Hello everyone. Uh, I'm Ahmed Rashad, the founder of Perle AI and Perle Labs, and we are... we build datasets and we curate them and we label them from frontier labs for uh for frontier labs for startups all over the world in the US and Europe and in the Middle East. And today, uh, we are doing a release of a new product that I wanted to share with you, which is Perle Labs Creator.

So, let's see. Yep, so it's Perle Labs Creator and I... I've actually had a very untraditional uh approach to to tech and how I started. I started in tech about a little over two decades ago. I actually was an offshore oil driller, taught myself how to code, built a product and sold it and became a tech guy 20 years ago. Since then I've um I've done a whole bunch of things, went to MIT, McKinsey, Amazon and later I was building all the data operations at Scale AI. And from there, across all of these, it was always the same problem. The models keep getting better but the data was still the bottleneck. And that's why we built uh and that's why we built Perle.

So at Perle we believe that humans, not black box pipelines, should guide the creation of AI and to do that we need a unified platform that brings creators, contributors, and data integrity into one seamless platform. And this is exactly what you're seeing in front of you right now. This is a very simplified data pipeline setup that literally takes minutes instead of weeks and days and sometimes months to to to set up the data pipeline and get your data flowing. And you can set up payment, you can... everything is AI assisted so actually we have pre-built workflows that help you figure out what the pipeline should be. You could pay immediately with credit card or or with your with your Solana wallet.

And the teams now can launch the projects within seconds with very very little overhead. This is a process that used to take days, weeks, and months. And on top of it, every template is... reflects Perle's quality baseline so that teams have proven structure. So teams... also Creator gives teams complete control over the version tracking, over instructions, schemas, rubrics, and all the things that you need to know to be able to have a proper AI data pipeline. And all of this is logged, even the edits, and nothing gets lost.

So once your task is... now once your task is ready, it's literally routed through our smart router to verified contributors, not anonymous crowd labor. Everyone working on it has known expertise, performance history, and domain uh scores. We know exactly how well a person is going to do in that specific task and the structure is what makes this a real marketplace, not just gig work.

So here the transparency becomes power because you get live accuracy signals, which is nothing that the industry has seen before. Reviewer agreements, task latency, anomaly flags. You get to see all of this, full provenance. So you always know how, when your data was produced and by whom. You get to have a say in how your data pipelines are managed. You get to choose who gets to work on your data and you get to see the history of it. And all of that without having to set up a team of hundreds of people to manage your data pipelines and do all this work. All of this is built into the product itself.

Now, this is for the first time, and I can't emphasize this enough, teams have full visibility into who touches everything. And the only way this is... we are able to do this is because we've built everything from scratch. We've seen these problems over and over again. I've literally set up thousands of data pipelines since my time at Amazon and then building operations at Scale. And this is always the main problem.

And what we do today is we are using the Solana high throughput infrastructure, which lets us handle millions of verifiable micro-events with low latency uh low latency updates and clean cryptographic audit trails. It streamlines the whole operation. It significantly reduces cost. It helps create the transparency that customers are craving. And the proof is in the pudding. We are... we are already working with most of the major frontier labs that you can think of because they see this as the future.

Now so now the teams are... to to wrap it up, that's what unlocks the real impact. The teams are moving significantly faster. They can iterate a lot faster and being able to iterate faster means they're faster to market, which is what everyone's trying to do. So setup time drops by 95 to 98 percent. Reviews are tighter. The entire process is transparent. There are no black boxes. And that's the human-led AI at scale. And today you get a first look of it. And we'll be... we're launching this immediately. Thank you all.

RISE Acquires BSX, a Perp DEX on Base, to Accelerate its Development of the First Integrated Orderbook Primitives
sources.snippet:
RISE Acquires BSX, a Perp DEX on Base, to Accelerate its Development of the First Integrated Orderbook Primitives
[![RISE Labs](https://blog.risechain.com/content/images/2025/02/Rise_Light-Logotype@2x.png)](https://blog.risechain.com)
[Sign in](#/portal/signin)[Subscribe](#/portal/signup)
[News](https://blog.risechain.com/tag/news/)Featured
# RISE Acquires BSX, a Perp DEX on Base, to Accelerate its Development of the First Integrated Orderbook Primitives
* [![Sasha Mai](https://blog.risechain.com/content/images/size/w100/2025/04/IMG_0302.JPG)](https://blog.risechain.com/author/sasha/)
#### [Sasha Mai](https://blog.risechain.com/author/sasha/)
11 Nov 2025•2 min read
![RISE Acquires BSX, a Perp DEX on Base, to Accelerate its Development of the First Integrated Orderbook Primitives](https://blog.risechain.com/content/images/size/w2000/2025/11/Acquisition-3.png)
*BSX Labs, backed by Blockchain Capital and Coinbase Ventures, brings expertise from supporting over $15B in orderbook trading volume. The team will help RISE develop EVM-based synchronously composable orderbook primitives that will bridge traditional financial markets.*
**Singapore –November 11, 2025**–[RISE](http://risechain.com/?ref=blog.risechain.com)today announced its acquisition of BSX Labs, the team behind the BSX perpetuals exchange on the Base network.
The BSX team’s experience in designing and operating a hybrid orderbook trading system positions RISE to accelerate innovation in fully onchain orderbook products, a core use case of RISE’s high-speed Ethereum Layer 2 blockchain. This collaboration will deliver Integrated Orderbook Primitives that benefit from synchronous composability with other DeFi applications, higher speed and throughput, and increased compatibility between blockchain and traditional financial markets; opening new opportunities for both retail and institutional users as well as app developers.
> "The BSX team built an impressive trading engine that attracted significant volume and a loyal user base," said **> Sam Battenally, CEO of RISE
**> . "Integrating their technology and talent is a key strategic step for us. It accelerates our roadmap towards launching a native, best-in-class orderbook infrastructure on RISE."
The market is yet to see fully composable orderbooks onchain and at scale. Existing solutions are either fragmented with custom execution, or the underlying chain cannot support such scale. With the immense forecasted growth of stablecoins and tokenization, RISE, together with the BSX team, is taking an opinionated bet that integrated perps and spot orderbooks will be the preferred infrastructure for brokers, asset issuers and retail traders.
With Integrated Orderbooks, retail brokers get access to deep liquidity, asset issuers can list spot and perps instruments for their assets; and users get access to the best execution, new assets and net-new DeFi yield opportunities.
BSX launched in 2023 and processed over $15B in cumulative trading volume. The acquisition will provide a path forward for BSX token holders, who will be eligible for an airdrop of RISE’s upcoming native token, with 1.5% of the RISE token total supply allocated to BSX tokens currently in circulation in the market.
> "Joining RISE is an incredible opportunity for our team and our community," said **> Avi, CEO of BSX Labs
**> . "We share a vision for a more performant and transparent onchain trading future. With the resources and ecosystem of RISE, we can now build that future at a much larger scale."
As part of the integration, the BSX decentralized exchange (DEX) will be sunsetted in a structured one-week process. The shutdown of the BSX DEX will commence on November 11, 2025 at 15:00 UTC. Users are advised to visit the[BSX blog](https://mirror.xyz/bsx.eth?ref=blog.risechain.com)for instructions on closing positions and withdrawing assets, and for further details.
**About BSX Labs:**
BSX Labs was the developer of the BSX Protocol, a decentralized perpetuals e

tags.impact_reason: The launch of Perle Labs Creator, which integrates Solana wallets for payments and focuses on improving AI data pipelines with human-led approaches, represents a solid update in the AI sector on Solana, though its overall ecosystem impact remains to be seen.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a 'Data Pipeline' as the semantic anchor because the story is explicitly about Perle Labs creating a new, transparent, on-chain data pipeline to replace slow, opaque 'black box' systems. The visual narrative contrasts a corroded, old pipe with a new, crystalline one to represent this technological leap. For the homepage, I integrated the text '-98%' as a glowing, diegetic metric on the new pipeline's surface, directly referencing the headline's core claim of slashing setup time and reinforcing the theme of high-velocity efficiency.
visual_idea.description: In a dark, cavernous data center, a massive, old, corroded iron pipeline representing a 'black box' system is shattering apart. From within its fractured shell, a new, perfectly transparent crystalline pipeline emerges, carrying torrents of brilliant cyan and magenta light that flow at incredible speed. The glowing text '-98%' is holographically projected onto the side of the new pipeline, like a real-time efficiency metric. The background is filled with the deep, out-of-focus racks of servers, emphasizing scale and depth.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A monumental, old, corroded iron pipeline, representing a 'black box' system, dramatically shatters within a dark, cavernous data center. From its fractured, rusted shell, a new, perfectly transparent crystalline pipeline emerges. Torrential flows of brilliant cyan and magenta light course through the new pipeline at incredible speed. A holographic projection of the glowing text '-98%' shimmers on its crystalline surface, illustrating a real-time efficiency metric. In the deep, out-of-focus background, endless racks of servers emphasize the immense scale and technological depth of the environment. The old iron pipeline features hyper-detailed corrosion and oxidation, with realistic rusted textures and deep, dramatic shadows highlighting every crack. The new crystalline pipeline is rendered with ray-traced optics, showcasing flawless transparency, intricate light refractions, and a pristine, futuristic aesthetic. The cyan and magenta light torrents exhibit a vibrant, bioluminescent glow with subtle particle effects, creating a sense of rapid, liquid data flowing. Composed vertically (3:4 aspect ratio) to emphasize monumental height and epic scale, with ample negative space at the top, drawing the eye upwards. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, physically based rendering, volumetric lighting, cinematic.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a 'Data Pipeline' as the semantic anchor because the story is explicitly about Perle Labs creating a new, transparent, on-chain data pipeline to replace slow, opaque 'black box' systems. The visual narrative contrasts a corroded, old pipe with a new, crystalline one to represent this technological leap. For the homepage, I integrated the text '-98%' as a glowing, diegetic metric on the new pipeline's surface, directly referencing the headline's core claim of slashing setup time and reinforcing the theme of high-velocity efficiency.
visual_idea.description: A macro, detailed shot focusing on the transition point. The coarse, rusted texture of the old, cracking pipeline is juxtaposed against the perfectly smooth, clear surface of the new crystalline pipeline emerging from within. We see the vibrant, glowing streaks of data inside the transparent section, refracting light and casting a colorful glow onto the corroded metal fragments.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro, detailed shot focusing on the transition point. The coarse, rusted texture of the old, cracking pipeline is juxtaposed against the perfectly smooth, clear surface of the new crystalline pipeline emerging from within. We see the vibrant, glowing streaks of data inside the transparent section, refracting light and casting a colorful glow onto the corroded metal fragments. The crystalline glass pipeline has ray-traced optics, providing a perfectly smooth, clear, and reflective surface. The rusted iron pipeline shows hyper-detailed, coarse, and cracking textures. The bioluminescent data flow within the transparent section emits vibrant, glowing streaks of light, casting colorful refractions onto the corroded metal fragments, emphasizing a technological breakthrough. Composed for a SQUARE aspect ratio (1:1), with strong symmetry, central focus, and tight macro framing that fills the entire frame with intricate texture. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, physically based rendering (PBR), cinematic lighting, volumetric lighting.

editorial.headline: Perle Labs Launches On-Chain Data Pipeline, Slashes Setup Time by 98%
editorial.standfirst: Former Scale AI executive Ahmed Rashad unveils 'Perle Labs Creator' to fix the opaque supply chain of AI training data. By leveraging Solana for cryptographic provenance, the platform offers frontier labs a transparent, high-velocity alternative to black-box data pipelines.
key_takeaways: 98% Efficiency Gain: Data pipeline setup reduced from weeks to minutes via AI-assisted workflows.
Institutional Grade: Built by Scale AI and Amazon veterans; already deployed with major frontier labs.
On-Chain Provenance: Solana mainnet utilized for real-time audit trails, contributor verification, and instant global payments.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
In a crowded AI infrastructure market, **Perle Labs** delivered a high-signal keynote at Solana Breakpoint 2025, addressing the industry's most persistent bottleneck: the integrity and velocity of training data. Founder **Ahmed Rashad**, whose pedigree includes leadership roles at **Scale AI** and **Amazon**, argued that while model architectures are becoming commoditized, high-quality, verifiable data remains the true differentiator. The launch of **Perle Labs Creator** marks a shift from opaque "black box" data pipelines to a transparent, on-chain marketplace that connects frontier labs with verified human experts.

The platform's core value proposition is a drastic reduction in operational friction. Rashad demonstrated a pipeline setup process that cuts deployment time by 95-98%, transforming what was once a multi-week engineering burden into a task measured in minutes. Unlike traditional crowd-work platforms that rely on anonymous labor, Creator emphasizes "known expertise," utilizing domain-specific scoring and performance history to route tasks. This structure allows institutional clients to audit the provenance of every data point—knowing exactly who labeled it, when, and their qualification level.

Critically, Perle has chosen **Solana** not merely for payments, but as a high-throughput settlement layer for data integrity. The protocol handles millions of verifiable micro-events, creating a cryptographic audit trail for quality assurance—feature sets that are increasingly vital as AI models face scrutiny over bias and accuracy. "Transparency becomes power," Rashad noted, highlighting that clients now receive live accuracy signals and anomaly flags that were previously invisible in legacy systems.

For institutional investors and developers, this represents a maturing of the "DePIN for AI" thesis. By moving the coordination layer of human-reinforcement learning (RLHF) on-chain, Perle is positioning itself as the trust layer for the next generation of specialized AI agents. With the platform already integrating with major frontier labs, the focus is squarely on speed to market: enabling research teams to iterate faster by removing the operational drag of data logistics.
